docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-14-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-14-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCE: PLAINTIFF ALAN JOSIMAR SANTOS PAREDES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PERLA YAJAIRA IRIGOYEN ZAVALA IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-14-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANTOS PAREDES, ALAN JOSIMAR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IRIGOYEN ZAVALA, PERLA YAJAIRA $1,399.23 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,449.23 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY SANTOS PAREDES, ALAN JOSIMAR AS TO DEFENDANT IRIGOYEN ZAVALA, PERLA YAJAIRA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-14-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $0.00 SERVED JUN-06-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT IRIGOYEN ZAVALA, PERLA YAJAIRA
